task.title: Use streaming PTY input in CLI drive

events.content: Drive and passthrough now use SDK PTY input streams: Drive and passthrough now use SDK PTY input streams

raw.question: Drive and passthrough now use SDK PTY input streams
raw.chosen: Drive and passthrough now use SDK PTY input streams
raw.reasoning: Both CLI modes represent direct human terminal input, so they should use AgentRelayClient.openInputStream while Relay messages continue through delivery and flush APIs.

retrospective.summary: Updated drive and passthrough CLI sessions to open SDK PTY input streams before raw-mode stdin takeover, kept Relay flush/delivery paths unchanged, and added CLI tests for stream writes and open failures.
